executives.name: Peter Kukielski
executives.background: Mr. Kukielski was appointed President and Chief Executive Officer of Hudbay in 2019. He has more than 30 years of experience in the mining industry. Previously, he was Executive Chairman of Waratah Resources Limited and President and CEO of Nevsun Resources Ltd. He also served as Chief Executive of ArcelorMittal Mining and held executive positions at Teck Resources and Falconbridge.

executives.name: Eugene Lei
executives.background: Mr. Lei was appointed Chief Financial Officer in 2022. He joined Hudbay in 2012 and has held progressively senior roles in corporate development and strategy. Prior to Hudbay, he was an investment banker at a major Canadian bank.

executives.name: Andre Lauzon
executives.background: Mr. Lauzon was appointed Chief Operating Officer in 2022. He joined Hudbay in 2012 and has held various operational leadership roles, including Vice President of the Manitoba Business Unit and Vice President, Business Development and Technical Services.

executives.name: Patrick Donnelly
executives.background: Mr. Donnelly was appointed Senior Vice President, Legal and Organizational Effectiveness in 2022. He joined Hudbay in 2008 and has served as General Counsel since 2011.

tenure_dates.title: Senior Vice President, Legal and Organizational Effectiveness

board_of_directors.name: Stephen Lang
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Lang is the Chair of the Board. He was formerly the President and CEO of Centerra Gold Inc. and has over 40 years of experience in the mining industry, including executive roles at Stillwater Mining Company and Barrick Gold.

board_of_directors.name: Peter Kukielski
board_of_directors.background: President and Chief Executive Officer of Hudbay Minerals Inc.

board_of_directors.name: Carol Banducci
board_of_directors.background: Ms. Banducci was formerly the EVP and CFO of IAMGOLD Corporation. She has extensive experience in financial management and corporate strategy in the mining and manufacturing sectors.

board_of_directors.name: Igor Gonzales
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Gonzales was formerly the COO of Buenaventura and Barrick Gold. He has over 35 years of experience in the mining industry.
committees: Environmental, Health, Safety and Sustainability Committee (Chair)

board_of_directors.name: Jeane Hull
board_of_directors.background: Ms. Hull was formerly the EVP and Chief Technical Officer of Peabody Energy. She has extensive experience in engineering and operations.
committees: Environmental, Health, Safety and Sustainability Committee

board_of_directors.name: George Paspalas
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Paspalas is the President and CEO of MAG Silver Corp. He has over 30 years of experience in the mining industry.

board_of_directors.name: David Smith
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Smith was formerly the CFO of Finning International Inc. and Ballard Power Systems.

sources.source_description: Hudbay Minerals Official Website - Leadership and Governance
